root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' ) as address from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth between to_date( ('!year!'-61) || '-10-2 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date(('!year!'-60) ||'-10-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011002' and '011002' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
